issues.description: Action type 'KO' is incorrect. Card text states 'place at the bottom of the owner's deck', which is a return-to-deck action, not KO. No equivalent legacy alias exists for this action in the DSL spec.

Missing condition: 'If your Leader has the {Kuja Pirates} type' must be represented as a condition (e.g., LeaderHasType or LeaderHasAnyType with value 'Kuja Pirates'). Current DSL has no conditions array.
ReturnToHand is mandatory in the DSL but optional ('You may return...') in card text. Should be wrapped in optional structure or trigger should reflect the conditional nature.
